prompts.text: Professional studio food photography of sliced Korean gimbap rice rolls, showcasing a vibrant and colorful cross-section of fresh ingredients. Elegant three-quarter angle view, premium food styling, glossy seaweed wrap, delicate moisture droplets on the fresh fillings. Soft professional lighting with natural window reflections, crisp details, shot on an 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, commercial stock photo quality, isolated on a seamless white background.

Premium food photography of Korean Japgokbap multigrain rice in a traditional black stone bowl, overhead flat lay shot, isolated on a clean white background with a soft drop shadow. Glistening, moist texture on the grains of purple rice, beans, and barley. Bright and clean commercial studio lighting, soft window light highlights, 85mm lens, sharp focus, high-end culinary styling, minimalist aesthetic, commercial stock photo.

Flat lay, top-down view, sharp focus on the glistening savory glaze and rich textures. Professional commercial food photography of freshly sliced Korean gimbap rice rolls arranged on a rustic ceramic plate, showcasing a vibrant, colorful cross-section of fresh ingredients. 45-degree close-up angle, shot on an 85mm lens with a shallow depth of field. Bright, natural studio lighting simulating soft window light, highlighting the glossy seaweed texture and subtle moisture droplets on the fresh vegetables. Ultra-sharp focus, clean minimalist composition, isolated on a solid white background.

Soft diffused studio lighting, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, vivid colors, crisp details, isolated on a pure white background.
